since_last: 36% of 100 AI names green; Powering AI leads +0.16%; AI bubble risk 51 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 36% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.09% · BTC +1.08% · Gold -0.40% · Nasdaq100 -0.44%. 36% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. Powering AI is doing the heavy lifting at +0.16%.

cards.headline: Powering AI leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Powering AI at +0.16%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -3.04%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: RXRX is the standout at -8.11%
cards.body: Leaders: META +6.01%, UEC +2.46%, BABA +2.01%, NVDA +1.62%, NXE +1.42%. Laggards: RXRX -8.11%, CEVA -6.58%, S -5.25%, CRWD -4.92%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.94% at $147.69
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.94% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 51 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 51/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
